rows.t: NPD Validation & Feedback V4.8 (Non-Basis verification)

5/27 - NPD indicates 6/15 date to complete.
6/11 - Precision looks good. Recall - Orphan testing on-going. Few issues noted. Not a blocker.
6/18 - Non-basis testing completed. Recall/Orphan - name tokenization, still issue. Content Sets: Real property, DMV, Dockets, & others

rows.t: Complete Build out of Authority again. (v4.8) - New Snapping or Merging logic to handle Multi-Matches efficiently
rows.n:
6/11 - Currently on track. Challenges noted.
6/18 - In-progress. Testing merging & super entities. BAHR kicked off today.
6/24 - BAHR issue fixed, analysis in progress. Samples can be shared for NPD review

rows.t: Review NPD testing plan for v4.8
rows.n:
Precision testing pulls 200 random entities at each confidence level.
6/18 - Test plan already in place
6/24: Samples for CCH/EQCH looking good. BAHR samples will be shared shortly

rows.t: NPD Validation & Feedback (Authority quality / Basis content) on V4.8
rows.n:
Question for NPD: Do we need 20 days to verify Basis content again?
6/24: Samples for CCH/EQCH looking good so far. BAHR samples will be shared shortly

rows.t: Review NPD testing plan for v6.0
rows.n:
Precision and Recall testing pulls 100-200 records per Content Set.
6/18 - test plan in place
6/24: Still on target. Focusing on BAHR Merge rules, which might push deliveries by a week

This is the process of mapping all existing ERD based relationships into new Person Authority relationships. This is not rematching of content.

jun23.name: Basis Person Authority Build Up
state: Execution of the Basis/Authority build-up on V4.8 is underway. CCH and EQCH runs have been completed and successfully merged.
BAHR workflow is currently under investigation due to a performance issue encountered during the merge process.
risks: The team is monitoring downstream dependencies, including the NPD review and Recall readiness for V4.8.
next: NER working with Labs to fix on-going BAHR workflow issue and merge
We do need to balance urgency to build authority with best quality practices. We want a good authority, and ensuring merge is correct is worth the time spent.

jun23.name: Non-Basis People Matching/Grading
state: NER–LTC integration is functionally complete, with NER successfully receiving load and promote notifications.
next: Final readiness is pending subscription setup and end-to-end testing, which are currently in progress.

jun23.name: People Warehouse Integration & Transit Pipeline Readiness
state: Document Facet initial development for file creation completed. Testing of file creation in progress. Working with Distribution Service and Warehouse team on design for delivering files to on-Prem for ingestion.
Transit Files development in progress. Identification of certain fields usage still being determined. Design for distribution of files to downstream consumers still in progress.
Entity Snapping POC - Initial process has been executed and verified in lower environments. Working to ensure will scale and what environment we will run against.
risks: People Warehouse Exadata availability for testing. 19c complications and timeline disruptions may delay these needed tests.
next: Identify efficient method of delivering Transit Files to warehouse for ingestion. Fleshing out final data attributes that make up the Transit Files.

jun23.name: Labs – Model V6
state: Finalised merge logic for PA build-up and provided ongoing support for unforeseen build-up issues.
risks: V6.1/6.2 delivery remains sensitive due to dependencies on authority build-up and annotation readiness, with emerging model refinement needs indicating timelines may be insufficient to achieve target quality.
next: Deliver V6 matching model for non-basis content matching, which includes handling of associated addresses and estimated DOB, enabling more accurate matching.
impact: Ensured reduction of entities in new PA compared to legacy authority, ensuring high precision of entity merges and adherence to business rules.

jun23.name: GCO
state: Working on setting up regression using Verification service along with Dana & Tom
Following up (live discussions) with TransUnion on the duplicate legacy id issue
Coordinating QA workflow runs with RA team for PA build using 4.8 model
next: Complete setting up regression using Verification service along with Dana & Tom
Following up (live discussions) with TransUnion on the duplicate legacy id issue
Complete QA build for PA build
Facilitate discussions for Quality workstreams

jun23.name: NPD – Annotating Updates
state: Basis Content – formalized testing plan for 4.8 and 6.0 Models, including Precision Tasks with anomalous entities and conflicting data elements.
Basis Content – Labs implemented Conflicting Data rules.
Non-Basis Content Precision and Recall Annotating - Completion of 4.8 Tasks across all content types.
Non-Basis Precision – no significant issues identified.
Non-Basis Recall – identification of Name Tokenization issues within several content types, including Real Property and DMV.
Non-Basis Recall - identification of FN and CN Grades (missed matches), will be reviewed with Labs and NER and tested again in 6.0 Model.
risks: Recall – Continued Review of Issues noted above, Tokenization and Missed Matches.
next: Basis Content – 4.8 Model Precision Annotating Tasks (across various score ranges).
Basis Content – 4.8 Model Recall Annotating Tasks.
Delta Comparison – In progress, ERD vs. Current Model, False Positives and new Matches.
Non-Basis Precision and Recall Annotating – 6.0 Model Review Tasks.
Review of Checklist for conversion to new pathway.
Opt-Out Annotating and Review as needed.

jul07.name: Basis Person Authority Build Up
state: Execution of the Basis/Authority build-up on V4.8 has completed with all 4 Basis Content being successfully merged. All issues identified during the process were resolved. NPD validations look promising
risks: Although authority quality looks good, there are a few extra entities in authority that are being investigated
next: NER working with Labs to tighten/loosen few more rules for merge before the next round of basis publishing. Meanwhile the PA will be used for ongoing content matching testing.

jul07.name: Non-Basis People Matching/Grading
state: NER–LTC integration is functionally complete with integration to QA underway. Product validation for annotations from samples results look satisfactory.
risks: Dependency on Active MQ migration Aug 1 for Prod LTC. Nothing at this point. There is a dependency when NER-LTC goes to Prod, for LTC to be migrated to ActiveMQ.
next: Edge cases of NER–LTC integration will be tested. New 6.0 model will be integrated for matching.

jul07.name: People Warehouse Integration & Transit Pipeline Readiness
state: Document Facet development to deliver load file to storage is complete. Testing for Basis/Non-Basis against onPrem is underway. Working with Distribution Service on delivering files to on-Prem for ingestion.
Development to create Transit files is wrapping up. Design for Distribution of files to downstream consumers will be finalized this week. Next-up is comparison with onPrem generated Transit files.
Entity Snapping POC - Initial process has been executed and verified in lower environments. Large scale Testing of process set to start this week to determine throughput and time needed for cutover.
risks: People Warehouse Exadata availability for testing. Utilizing PR22 for testing 7/6 thru 7/17. Coordinating with Postgres dev team.
next: Validation of DocFacet and Transit File output as compared to legacy outputted files.
POC to determine throughput to inform cutover timeline.

jul07.name: NPD – Annotating Updates
state: Basis Content – Review of 4.8 in progress, Precision and Recall.
Non-Basis Content - Recall, continued discussions on name and address parsing issues (Tokenization).
risks: Recall – Continued Review of Issues noted above, Tokenization and Missed Matches.
next: Basis Content – 4.8 Model Precision Annotating Tasks to completion.
Basis Content – 4.8 Model Recall Annotating Tasks to completion.
Delta Comparison – In progress, ERD vs. Current Model, False Positives and new Matches.
Non-Basis Precision and Recall Annotating – 6.0 Model Review Tasks.
Review of Checklist for conversion to new pathway.
Opt-Out Annotating and Review as needed.

jul07.name: Labs – Model V6
state: Successfully delivered V6 matching model for non-basis content matching, which includes handling of associated addresses and estimated DOB, enabling more accurate matching.
risks: V6.1/6.2 delivery remains sensitive due to dependencies on authority build-up and annotation readiness, with emerging model refinement needs indicating timelines may be insufficient to achieve target quality.
next: Deliver revised name tokenizer (improved multi-person splitting and tokenization for ambiguous FN/LN). Improve name normalization (ensure only real AKAs are returned as normalized names), revisit address handling (post boxes and military addresses), and investigate FN/LN flips.

jul07.name: Labs – Retraining Pipeline
state: Ongoing PoC to move model training from AWS SageMaker to Snowflake
